description: Local non-executing audit chain for StrategyGroup runtime liveness; does not call Tokyo, exchange write, or real submit.

cost_review.net_edge_note: VCB L1 would-enter sample makes compression-breakout opportunities visible without L2 or L4 authority

notes: L1 observe-only replay.
Would-enter review evidence must not create shadow candidate, FinalGate, Operation Layer, or order authority.

cost_review.net_edge_note: no-compression replay keeps VCB quiet without hiding the StrategyGroup from review

notes: Compression did not contract enough before breakout.

cost_review.net_edge_note: false-breakout sample should revise VCB classifier before any L2 promotion

notes: False-breakout disable state is not mature enough for L2.
This is observation evidence, not a blocker for MPG P0 live readiness.

cost_review.net_edge_note: VCB requires compression window and false-breakout context before L2 review

notes: Missing compression context keeps the sample observe-only.

cost_review.net_edge_note: VCB stale replay proves freshness rejection before observation promotion review

notes: Stale VCB observation cannot become L2 review evidence.

cost_review.net_edge_note: LSR current-v0 long sweep sample keeps liquidity-sweep observations visible without L2 or L4 authority

notes: L1 observe-only replay.
Current broader preview long-side semantics conflict with the stronger short-revival research lane.

cost_review.net_edge_note: short-revival sample documents the side-specific rewrite gap before any L2 promotion review

notes: Research lead is short upper-range revival, while current local evaluator is long sweep.
This case exists to keep the rewrite gap visible without changing runtime scope.

cost_review.net_edge_note: no-sweep replay keeps LSR quiet without hiding the StrategyGroup from review

notes: No reclaim/rejection after sweep, so no observation candidate should be created.

cost_review.net_edge_note: LSR requires range and sweep context before observation promotion review

notes: Missing range context keeps the sample observe-only.

cost_review.net_edge_note: LSR stale replay proves freshness rejection before observation promotion review

notes: Stale LSR observation cannot become L2 review evidence.

cost_review.net_edge_note: BRF L1 would-enter sample makes bear-rally-failure short observations visible without L2 or L4 authority

notes: L1 observe-only replay.
Rally-high protection shape is visible but cannot authorize a shadow candidate.

cost_review.net_edge_note: rally-not-failed replay keeps BRF quiet without hiding it from review

notes: Rally did not fail, so BRF should not create observation evidence.

cost_review.net_edge_note: short-squeeze-risk sample should revise BRF classifier before any L2 promotion review

notes: Short-side rally failure can be right-tail, but squeeze risk must stay visible.
This warning is review evidence, not a P0 live-order blocker.

cost_review.net_edge_note: BRF requires rally-high, rejection close, and squeeze-risk context before promotion review

notes: Missing rally context keeps BRF observe-only.

cost_review.net_edge_note: BRF stale replay proves freshness rejection before observation promotion review

notes: Stale BRF observation cannot become L2 review evidence.

cost_review.net_edge_note: BTPC L2 would-enter sample expands observation coverage without L4 authority

notes: L2 shadow candidate observation only.
This can create review evidence but cannot enter FinalGate or Operation Layer.

cost_review.net_edge_note: no-signal replay keeps BTPC observation visible without creating candidate authority

notes: Bear trend context was not mature enough for would-enter.

cost_review.net_edge_note: strong-uptrend disable classifier blocks BTPC L2 review promotion, not P0 live readiness

notes: Short-side BTPC signal must stay blocked during strong-uptrend conflict.

cost_review.net_edge_note: BTPC requires derivatives context before L2 shadow evidence can be trusted

notes: Missing OI/crowding context blocks L2 review readiness.

cost_review.net_edge_note: BTPC stale replay proves L2 freshness rejection before any promotion review

notes: Stale BTPC observation cannot become shadow candidate evidence.

owner_summary.non_authority_checkpoint: Use replay/synthetic rehearsal while P0 waits for a real fresh signal.
summary_lines: BTPC-001 L2 shadow replay corpus expands opportunity coverage without L4 authority.
VCB-001 L1 observe-only replay corpus expands volatility breakout visibility without L2 or L4 authority.
LSR-001 L1 observe-only replay corpus keeps liquidity-sweep and short-revival rewrite gaps visible without L2 or L4 authority.
BRF-001 L1 observe-only replay corpus expands bear-rally-failure short visibility without L2 or L4 authority.
Synthetic fixtures cover fresh, stale, missing fact, conflict, protection, and profile-boundary cases.
Post-submit simulator covers accepted, failed-protection, partial-fill, reject, closed, and still-open shapes.
Cost/slippage/funding fields are review inputs only.
Replay output is non-executing and cannot authorize a real order.

post_submit_simulator_matrix.input_state: entry accepted and exchange-native hard stop created
notes: Normal accepted-entry path with protection present.

post_submit_simulator_matrix.input_state: entry filled but exchange-native SL creation failed
notes: Recovery shape is standing-authorized but still non-executing here.

post_submit_simulator_matrix.input_state: entry partially filled before final protection/reconciliation
notes: Partial fill keeps lifecycle open until reconciliation completes.

post_submit_simulator_matrix.input_state: exchange submit rejected before order acceptance
notes: Rejected submit must not be projected as active exposure.

post_submit_simulator_matrix.input_state: position closed by exchange-native stop loss
notes: SL closure must finalize and enter review.

post_submit_simulator_matrix.input_state: position partially or fully closed by TP1
notes: TP1 path checks runner/remainder review shape.

post_submit_simulator_matrix.input_state: entry remains open and protected after post-submit checks
notes: Open protected position remains monitored, not falsely completed.

cost_review.net_edge_note: trend continuation sample has positive gross-edge shape after estimated friction

notes: Historical replay sample only.
May exercise dry-run chain shape but is not a live market signal.

cost_review.net_edge_note: false breakout keeps execution path valid but review should revise signal quality

notes: Replay warning only; weak evidence is not a live-safety blocker.

cost_review.net_edge_note: fast reversal remains useful to rehearse exit and review downgrade behavior

notes: Exercises fast exit review shape without live authority.

cost_review.net_edge_note: choppy window should stay quiet and preserve capital for right-tail windows

notes: No candidate/auth should be generated in choppy replay.

cost_review.net_edge_note: stale replay must prove freshness rejection before submit authority

notes: Stale replay never reaches Operation Layer shape.

cost_review.net_edge_note: missing facts block before any execution-cost authority matters

notes: RequiredFacts missing blocks prepare chain.

cost_review.net_edge_note: active position conflict blocks duplicate exposure regardless of edge

notes: Conflict replay must not reach Operation Layer shape.

cost_review.net_edge_note: missing protection remains a mechanical hard stop, not generic risk aversion

notes: Protection-missing replay proves hard stop behavior.

cost_review.net_edge_note: cost review skeleton only; not submit authority

notes: No candidate/auth should be generated.

cost_review.net_edge_note: cost review skeleton only; not submit authority

notes: Exercises the non-executing fast chain.

cost_review.net_edge_note: cost review skeleton only; not submit authority

notes: Stale signal must not enter Operation Layer shape.

cost_review.net_edge_note: cost review skeleton only; not submit authority

notes: RequiredFacts gate blocks before prepare chain.

cost_review.net_edge_note: cost review skeleton only; not submit authority

notes: Active position conflict blocks new real action.

cost_review.net_edge_note: cost review skeleton only; not submit authority

notes: Open order conflict blocks duplicate exposure.

cost_review.net_edge_note: cost review skeleton only; not submit authority

notes: Protection missing blocks live action.

cost_review.net_edge_note: cost review skeleton only; not submit authority

notes: Only selected StrategyGroup/symbol/side/profile boundary mismatch blocks.
Generic risk aversion must not block in-boundary opportunities.

scenarios.expected: evidence IDs connect through the official Operation Layer handoff, legacy local-registration probe blockers are satisfied by adapter evidence, disabled submit stays non-executing, and finalize/reconciliation/budget/review shapes are present
scenarios.name: mock_fresh_signal_dry_run_pass

scenarios.name: required_facts_missing
